comment: State flags consumed via state.flags.* context inputs and by the adverse_action node (ADMT artifacts). Rule files exist for states with substantive overlay rules; states absent from rule_files contribute only flag-driven behavior from common.rules.json.

notes.usury_first_lien: No usury gate for first-lien conforming loans - preempted by DIDMCA §501 (12 CFR Part 190). Documented negative rule; junior liens out of scope v1.
notes.hoepa_baseline: Federal HOEPA §32 high-cost test encoded in common.rules.json HC-000 as the nationwide floor (high-cost = not GSE-deliverable).
